---
description: "DEPRECATED — Use syspilot workflow instead: @syspilot.change → Implement via Cloud Agent"
---

# Generate Feature Issue for Coding Agent

> **⚠️ DEPRECATED**: This prompt has been superseded by the syspilot workflow.
>
> Use instead:
>
> 1. `@syspilot.change` — Analyze and approve the change (creates Change Document)
> 2. Choose **"Implement via Cloud Agent"** handoff → `@syspilot.implement-cloud`
>
> The cloud implement agent creates a structured GitHub Issue from the
> approved Change Document and assigns it to the GH Coding Agent.
